run_summary.summary: 🚨 Brandi couldn't run today — Gmail access was denied. The OAuth refresh token has expired or been revoked, so no emails were scanned. To fix this, you'll need to re-authorize Gmail access and update the refresh token in Brandi's scheduled run config. No deals were updated this run.
run_summary.error: Gmail OAuth token expired or revoked (invalid_grant). Re-authorization required.

suggestions.message: Gmail token is expired. Re-run the OAuth flow for hartmanncollabs@gmail.com and update the refresh token in Brandi's scheduled run configuration to restore email scanning.
